extraction.one_line_summary: O'CONNOR Ben attacked solo with 12km remaining on La Molina, held off disorganized chase led by Soler to take stage and race lead
tactical_patterns: Movistar's relentless pace-setting damaged BikeExchange specifically, showing targeted team disruption beyond general attrition on climbs.
Chase group failed to organize against O'Connor's solo move despite 12km distance, revealing coordination problems among GC rivals.
Van der Poel abandoned breakaway with 12km left just before O'Connor attacked, suggesting he read the decisive moment timing.

rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: positive: Solo attack from 12km out on La Molina held despite downhill section at 3km suggesting descending confidence
rider_signals.WEDERBERG Jonas: negative: Owned all jerseys entering stage but dropped badly on final climb, suggesting yesterday's dominance was unsustainable
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: neutral: Only rider to organize chase of O'Connor but couldn't close 10-second gap, showing individual strength without team support
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: negative: Abandoned race appearing unwell, avoided cameras suggesting pre-existing condition worsened
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: Dropped off back of group on final climb raising health concerns despite rejoining earlier
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: positive: Finished third at 12 seconds despite no reported offensive action, placing via positioning not attacking
